fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate` pairs a four-byte axis tag with its
design-space value. A collection of these coordinates describes the complete
position of a variable font instance. Pass them through
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.VariationDesignPosition> or directly to
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone*> to create a typeface at that position.

## Examples

```csharp
var coords = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
{
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate { Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wght"), Value = 700 },
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate { Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wdth"), Value = 100 },
};
using var typeface = original.Clone(coords);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a single axis-value pair used to position a variable font in its design space.
Gets or sets the four-byte tag identifying the variation axis.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> that identifies the axis (for example, <c>wght</c> for weight).

params.obj: The instance to compare with the current instance.

fields.summary: Determines whether this instance and the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> are equal.
